originalityStatement: This synthetic contract fixture was authored for Storyteller validation and contains no source map, character, dialogue, audiovisual signature, or encounter sequence.
purpose: route contract fixture for pattern.knowledge-gated-revisit; it defines an original scenario boundary and expected observable evidence, not a claim that a game runtime has already executed it.

recoveryRequirements: Restore target state after every wrong probe
Escalate hints from evidence location to relation to action class
